name: winget
title: WinGet
description: Search, install, and upgrade Windows packages via winget
author: eray_ercan

commands.name: search
commands.title: Search Packages
commands.subtitle: WinGet
commands.description: Search for packages in the winget repository and install them

commands.name: installed
commands.title: Installed Packages
commands.subtitle: WinGet
commands.description: List all installed packages with upgrade and uninstall actions

preferences.name: wingetPath
preferences.title: Winget Executable Path
preferences.description: Full path to the winget executable. Leave empty to use the system default.

preferences.name: runInBackground
preferences.title: Install / Upgrade
preferences.label: Run install and upgrade in background
preferences.description: When enabled, Raycast closes as soon as an install or upgrade starts. The operation continues in the background and a notification appears when it finishes.

preferences.name: hideUnmanagedPackages
preferences.title: Installed Packages
preferences.label: Hide packages not installed via WinGet or Microsoft Store
preferences.description: When enabled, packages without a known source are hidden from the Installed Packages list. Note: some WinGet-installed packages may temporarily appear without a source after installation.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use the \`@raycast/api\` package's publishing command instead.

" && exit 1
